label: annotate_downtime_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with forwardRef and aria-labelledby
Local useState (notes, catOverride, submitting) → useForm + zodResolver with z.object({ notes: z.string().min(1).max(500), catOverride: z.string() })
Mock data prop → Server Component fetching downtime event by ID via Drizzle from downtime_events table (08-PRODUCTION authoritative)
Hardcoded role string prop → session.user.role from next-auth/Clerk, RBAC guard in Server Action
PATCH /api/production/downtime-events/:id → Server Action with outbox event emitted on success
isSupervisor inline check → centralized can(role, 'downtime:override-category') policy function
editWindowClosed hardcoded false → computed server-side: event.ended_at + 3600s < now()
Hardcoded labels (e.g. 'Save note') → next-intl t('oee.downtime.annotate.save')

label: export_oee_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; format radio group → RadioGroup + RadioGroupItem from shadcn
sections useState object → useForm with z.object({ format: z.enum(['csv','pdf']), sections: z.object({...}) })
POST /api/reporting/export → Server Action calling 12-REPORTING export engine; queues a background job and returns jobId
Filename preview string interpolation → computed in useMemo, update on form value changes
XLSX option rendered disabled with P2 badge → feature-flag guard oee.export.xlsx_enabled, hide entirely when false
Raw snapshot warning (5 MB / 15-30s) → persist as toast notification after modal closes, not blocking alert
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.export.*') keys
Export recorded in report_exports → Server Action writes audit row before returning

label: line_override_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; title changes between create/edit based on data prop presence
Four separate useState fields → useForm with zodResolver; z.number().min(0).max(100) for each percentage field
Line select disabled on edit → field disabled via form schema + FormField disabled prop, not manual condition
Mock OEE_LINES_META → Server Component query from oee_line_configs table in 02-SETTINGS
Save override button → Server Action PUT /api/settings/oee/line-overrides/:lineId with RBAC oee_admin guard
Hardcoded tenant default hint (70/70/80/95) → fetched from oee_alert_thresholds tenant row, not hardcoded
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.settings.lineOverride.*')

label: big_loss_mapping_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='fullpage' → Dialog with DialogContent className='max-w-full h-screen' or dedicated Sheet primitive from shadcn
Local mapping state array + dirty flag → useForm with zodResolver on array field; isDirty from formState
Inline row selects mutating array copy → useFieldArray from react-hook-form for dynamic mapping rows
Reset to defaults button → form.reset(defaultValues) bound to BIG_LOSS_CATEGORIES seed from 02-SETTINGS
PUT /api/settings/oee/big-loss-mapping → Server Action; must invalidate all oee_daily_summary materialized views after publish
Historical data re-classifies dynamically note → add warning toast explaining MV refresh lag (~5 min)
Unpublished changes badge → use formState.isDirty, not manual dirty flag
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.settings.bigLossMapping.*')

label: changeover_detail_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='wide' → Dialog with DialogContent className='max-w-3xl'
Summary two-column grid → dl/dt/dd pairs wrapped in a CSS grid or shadcn Card with grid-cols-2
Mock CHANGEOVER_EVENTS data prop → Server Component fetching from changeover_events table (08-PRODUCTION authoritative)
Cross-link button → Next.js <Link href={`/production/changeover/${data.id}`}> rather than window.alert
Allergen risk field → color-coded Badge; allergen matrix ownership note kept as info Alert
Target duration → fetched from 02-SETTINGS changeover_target_duration_min per line, not embedded in event row
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.changeover.detail.*')

label: cell_drill_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='wide' → Dialog with DialogContent className='max-w-2xl'
Inline ArcGauge SVG components → production RadialBarChart from recharts or custom SVG component wrapped in a shared <ArcGauge /> server component
HEATMAP_APQ mock lookup → Server Action / loader fetching oee_shift_metrics row for (line, day, shift) triple
Hardcoded snapshot count '432 / 480 · 1 gap' → real gap detection query counting NULL slots in oee_snapshots
onPickLine callback → router.push(`/oee/line-trend?line=${data.line}`) in production
ArcGauge targets hardcoded (70/80/95) → sourced from oee_alert_thresholds per line or tenant default
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.heatmap.cellDrill.*')

label: request_edit_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal dismissible={false} → Dialog with onInteractOutside={(e) => e.preventDefault()} and no close-on-escape
reason.length >= 10 inline validation → zod z.string().min(10, 'Minimum 10 characters') in useForm
ReasonInput prototype component → Textarea with FormMessage showing remaining character hint
Server Action: POST /api/production/downtime-events/:id/escalate; sends in-app notification to nearest oee_supervisor role
Audit log entry must be written server-side on escalation submit
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.downtime.requestEdit.*')

label: delete_override_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal dismissible={false} → Dialog with onInteractOutside prevented; type-to-confirm pattern requires client component
confirm === data.line string match → zod z.literal(data.line) applied via superRefine on useForm
Delete button enabled only on match → formState.isValid gates button disabled prop
Server Action: DELETE /api/settings/oee/line-overrides/:lineId; must clear cached threshold for that line
After delete: revalidatePath('/oee/settings') and invalidate SWR/React Query key for oee_thresholds
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.settings.deleteOverride.*')

label: copy_clipboard_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='wide' → Dialog with DialogContent className='max-w-2xl'
Hardcoded sample text block → Server Component rendering actual KPI data from oee_daily_summary MV for requested date
navigator.clipboard?.writeText(sample) → client-side useClipboard() hook with toast feedback on success/failure
Pre tag for plain-text preview → keep as <pre> with scrollable overflow; no markdown rendering needed
Clipboard copy toast → use Sonner (shadcn toast) to confirm 'Copied to clipboard'
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.clipboard.*')

label: compare_weeks_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; two Select dropdowns for week A/B → Select + SelectItem populated from available week keys in oee_shift_metrics
Hardcoded preview KPI rows (74.8%, 77.1%, +2.3pp) → Server Action fetching actual week averages from oee_shift_metrics on weekA/weekB change
P1.5 backlog: Compare button routes to heatmap diff view → implement as query param ?compareWeekA=W15&compareWeekB=W16 on /oee/heatmap; BL-OEE-05
Week picker limited to 4 hardcoded weeks → dynamic: fetch last N weeks from oee_shift_metrics distinct week_key
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.heatmap.compareWeeks.*')
known_bugs: BL-OEE-05: Compare-weeks diff view — modal shows preview only, no live diff (Medium priority)

label: acknowledge_anomaly_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; dual-path action (investigate vs false-positive) drives different button variants (primary vs destructive)
action useState + notes → useForm z.object({ action: z.enum(['investigate','falsepositive']), notes: z.string().optional() })
Server Action: POST /api/oee/anomalies/:id/acknowledge; branches on action field; emits outbox event for audit workflow
EWMA rule oee_anomaly_detector_v1 is P2 — guard entire modal behind feature flag oee.anomaly_detection_enabled
Severity badge → dynamic color from severity value using cva variants map
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.anomaly.acknowledge.*')

label: auto_refresh_pause_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='sm' → Dialog with DialogContent className='max-w-sm'
Pill buttons for duration → ToggleGroup + ToggleGroupItem from shadcn/ui; selected item maps to z.number().int()
Pause logic → client-side: store pauseUntil = Date.now() + duration*60000 in Zustand or jotai atom; polling hook checks it
60s auto-refresh interval → useInterval hook paused when pauseUntil > Date.now()
No server interaction needed — purely client-side state management
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.autoRefresh.*')

label: oee_daily_summary_page
translation_notes: React.useState for date/lineFilter/tab/sort → URL search params via useSearchParams + router.push for shareable state; default date computed server-side as 'yesterday'
OEE_TODAY / SUMMARY_KPIS_TODAY mock objects → Server Component fetching from oee_daily_summary materialized view with date + line filter params
Five KPI cards row → each as a shadcn Card; click-to-scroll replaced by anchor link or router.push to line trend
Inline alert for LINE-02 → alerts driven by data: if any line OEE < threshold for 3 consecutive days, render Alert with drill link; no hardcoding
Three-tab layout (Summary / Six Big Losses / Changeover) → shadcn Tabs + TabsContent; tab state synced to URL ?tab= param
Sortable table → TanStack Table with server-side sort via searchParam col/dir; useOptimistic for immediate re-order UX
Factory avg footer row → computed in SQL window function, returned alongside line rows, not client-side reduce
Freshness / stale banner → Server Component reads oee_daily_summary.last_refreshed_at, renders Alert if > 20 min old
Hardcoded labels + subtitles → next-intl t('oee.summary.*')
known_bugs: BL-OEE-08: localStorage persistence for last-viewed date (Low priority)

label: six_big_losses_tab
translation_notes: SIX_BIG_LOSSES mock array + client-side reduce for A/P/Q totals → Server Component query aggregating downtime_events grouped by big_loss_category and impact dimension
Pareto bar chart (CSS div widths) → recharts BarChart or shadcn-compatible D3 bar; note BL-OEE-09 re: zero-dep SVG vs recharts decision
OEE impact decomposition <pre> block → computed server-side from real A/P/Q values, rendered as formatted text or a dedicated Card
Downtime events table with inline [Add note] / Edit links → annotate_downtime_modal opened client-side; table data from 08-PRODUCTION downtime_events API
Role-conditional column hint text → server-side: pass role from session, render appropriate hint; no client-side role check in JSX
Hardcoded legend labels (Plant/Process/People) → next-intl t('oee.losses.class.*') with Lean class enum
known_bugs: BL-OEE-09: Recharts dependency consideration vs inline SVG (Low priority)

label: changeover_tab
translation_notes: CHANGEOVER_EVENTS mock array + client-side reduce/filter for KPIs → Server Component aggregating changeover_events for given date from 08-PRODUCTION
Four KPI mini-cards (total, avg, high-allergen count, longest) → shadcn Card grid; all values from SQL aggregation not JS reduce
Allergen risk badge color mapping (High=red, Medium=amber, Low=green) → cva variant map shared across modules; enum driven from allergen_risk_level column
Variance badge (+/- colored) → shared <VarianceBadge> primitive with sign-aware color logic
View → button → opens changeover_detail_modal client-side with fetched row data
Target durations from 02-SETTINGS note → info Alert with cross-link to /settings/changeover-targets
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.changeover.*')

label: oee_line_trend_page
translation_notes: lineId + windowVal + shift as useState → URL search params (?line=LINE-02&window=24h&shift=all) for shareable deep links
OEE_TODAY / OEE_TREND mock objects → Server Component loading oee_snapshots with line + window filter; pass to client TrendChart as serialized data
Four ArcGauge header row with hover-highlight (hlAll) → client component island; gauges receive target from oee_alert_thresholds
TrendChart with downtime bands + changeover markers → recharts ComposedChart with ReferenceArea (downtime) + ReferenceLine (changeover); data from oee_snapshots + changeover_events join
Top Downtime Causes pareto bars → Server Component reading downtime_events aggregated by category for the line/window
Changeover summary mini-card → Server Component fetching latest changeover_events row for line, cross-links to changeover_detail_modal
LINE-02 alert hardcoded → alert driven by data: if any single downtime event > 60 min in window, render Alert with annotate CTA
Spark 7-day sparkline → recharts LineChart mini or inline SVG; data from oee_snapshots rolling 7-day window
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.lineTrend.*')
known_bugs: BL-OEE-01: Incremental chart append via ?since=last_ts — currently only toggle refresh (Medium priority)
BL-OEE-09: Recharts dependency consideration vs inline SVG (Low priority)

label: oee_shift_heatmap_page
translation_notes: week + lineFilter + selected cell as useState → URL search params (?week=2026-W16&line=all&selLine=LINE-02&selDay=sat&selShift=Night)
HEATMAP mock nested object → Server Component fetching oee_shift_metrics MV for given week, shaped into line×day×shift lookup
Heatmap grid role='grid' with gridcell + aria-label → keep ARIA attributes; add onKeyDown arrow-key navigation (BL-OEE-04)
heatColor() inline function → CSS custom property or Tailwind arbitrary value driven by OEE value thresholds; note BL-OEE-03 for color-blind mode
Selected cell detail panel with ArcGauge quartet → client island; data fetched via Server Action on cell click using (line, day, shift) triple
Four weekly KPI mini-cards → Server Component aggregation over oee_shift_metrics for the selected week
Compare weeks → compare_weeks_modal; BL-OEE-05 diff view remains a backlog item
Heatmap colour scale fixed in P1 (65/85) → note in settings screen; P2: make tenant-configurable via oee_alert_thresholds
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.heatmap.*')
known_bugs: BL-OEE-02: Sort by shift column in heatmap (Low priority)
BL-OEE-04: Arrow-key nav on heatmap cells (Low priority)

label: oee_downtime_pareto_page
translation_notes: Client-side cumulative Pareto calculation (sort + reduce) → move to Server Component or SQL window function SUM() OVER (ORDER BY mins DESC)
Pareto bar chart CSS divs with dynamic width → recharts BarChart + ComposedChart with secondary LineChart for cumulative curve (classic Pareto chart pattern)
80% threshold line detection (findIndex) → computed server-side, passed as prop; rendered as ReferenceArea on chart
Distribution by Lean class (plant/process/people) → GROUP BY lean_class SQL query, not JS filter+reduce
P2 preview alert → keep as info Alert; link to six_big_losses_tab on oee_daily_summary_page
Date range pills (Today / This week / 30 days) → URL param ?range=today|week|30d; Server Component reads and queries accordingly
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.pareto.*')
known_bugs: BL-OEE-09: Recharts dependency consideration vs inline SVG (Low priority)

label: oee_availability_drilldown_page
translation_notes: factoryA from SUMMARY_KPIS_TODAY → Server Component reading oee_daily_summary.factory_a for current date
A by line table with sparklines → Server Component; Spark data from oee_snapshots rolling 7-day window per line mapped to availability
Availability loss categories → SIX_BIG_LOSSES filtered by impact=A → Server Component query with WHERE impact_dimension = 'A'
7-day trend multi-line chart → recharts LineChart with one series per line; data from oee_snapshots 7-day window aggregated by day
Hardcoded MTBF note for MIX-04 → data-driven from 13-MAINTENANCE equipment_health table (P2 cross-module dependency)
Equipment Health cross-link → P2 route /oee/equipment-health; guard with feature flag oee.equipment_health_enabled
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.availability.*')

label: oee_performance_drilldown_page
translation_notes: factoryP from SUMMARY_KPIS_TODAY → Server Component reading oee_daily_summary.factory_p for current date
P by line table with micro stops column (Math.round(d.downtime/8)) → replace mock formula with real micro_stops_count from oee_snapshots
P loss categories → SIX_BIG_LOSSES filtered by impact=P → Server Component WHERE impact_dimension = 'P'
Sparkline data series for P dimension (SPARK_7D[l.id]) → separate query for performance dimension 7-day sparkline from oee_shift_metrics
Structure mirrors OeeAvailability exactly → extract shared <OeeFactorDrillPage> layout component parameterized by factor (A|P|Q)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.performance.*')

label: oee_quality_drilldown_page
translation_notes: factoryQ from SUMMARY_KPIS_TODAY → Server Component reading oee_daily_summary.factory_q for current date
Rejects column (Math.round(d.output * (1 - d.q/100))) → real reject_kg or reject_units column from production_output_events, not derived from mock
Q loss categories → SIX_BIG_LOSSES filtered by impact=Q → Server Component WHERE impact_dimension = 'Q'
QA holds cross-reference note → add link to /quality/holds?line=... when 09-QUALITY module is available
Structure mirrors OeeAvailability → same <OeeFactorDrillPage> parameterized component as OeePerformance
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.quality.*')

label: oee_settings_page
translation_notes: isAdmin role check + early return → middleware RBAC guard on /oee/settings route; server-side redirect to /oee if role !== oee_admin
edit/thresh useState toggle pattern → inline edit uses useForm + optimistic update; PUT Server Action on save
OEE_THRESHOLDS.tenant mutation on save → Server Action PUT /api/settings/oee/alert-thresholds; revalidatePath for all OEE dashboards
Per-line overrides table with Edit/Delete actions → TanStack Table with action column calling line_override_modal and delete_override_modal
Big Loss Mapping preview table (slice 0-8) → Server Component; '+ N more' count from Drizzle COUNT(); full editor in big_loss_mapping_modal
P2 rows with opacity:0.5 → render as disabled TableRow with Tooltip explaining P2 status; do not hide
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.settings.*')

label: oee_shift_configs_page
translation_notes: isAdmin role check + early return → middleware RBAC guard; server redirect if role !== oee_admin
SHIFT_CONFIGS mock array → Server Component reading shift_configs table from 02-SETTINGS database; this page is explicitly read-only in OEE
Edit in 02-SETTINGS cross-link button → Next.js <Link href='/settings/reference-tables/shift-configs'>; not window.alert
DSL rule status section → Server Component reading rule_registry row for shift_aggregator_v1 from 02-SETTINGS
Check Rule Status cross-link → /reporting/rules-usage route; Check Feature Flag → /settings/feature-flags route
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.shifts.*')

label: oee_anomaly_detection_page
translation_notes: P2 component — gate entire route behind feature flag oee.anomaly_detection_enabled; render redirect or 'Coming in P2' placeholder when disabled
ANOMALIES mock array → Server Component fetching oee_anomalies table populated by oee_anomaly_detector_v1 DSL rule
Table opacity:0.75 sample rows → full opacity when P2 is live; EWMA rule fires from 12-REPORTING rules engine
Severity badge color mapping → cva variant based on severity enum (critical/high/medium/low) matching badge-red/amber/blue/gray
Status badge (resolved/ack/open) → same cva variant map; ack action via acknowledge_anomaly_modal
In-app toast + daily email digest (OQ-OEE-08) → Server Action emits notification outbox event; email via /api/notifications/digest cron
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.anomalies.*')

label: oee_equipment_health_page
translation_notes: P2 component — gate route behind feature flag oee.equipment_health_enabled; depends on 13-MAINTENANCE module being live
EQUIPMENT_HEALTH mock array → Server Component joining equipment table (13-MAINTENANCE) with oee_snapshots for 30-day availability computation
MTBF / MTTR columns → computed server-side from maintenance_work_orders fault history; not stored directly
30-day A% CompBadge → same CompBadge primitive as other OEE tables, min threshold from oee_alert_thresholds
Trend arrow (up/down/stable) → server-side: compare last-7-day avg to prior-7-day avg availability; return enum
PM trigger rule note → oee_maintenance_trigger_v1 is DSL rule; link to /settings/rules/oee_maintenance_trigger_v1
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.equipmentHealth.*')

label: oee_tv_dashboard_page
translation_notes: P2 component — gate behind feature flag oee.tv_dashboard_enabled; OS kiosk decision open (OQ-OEE-03 / BL-OEE-06)
Dark-mode hardcoded inline styles (bg #0f172a, text #f8fafc) → Tailwind dark class scope on root div; or separate /oee/tv route with dark layout
30s auto-refresh → route.revalidate = 30 on a dedicated TV RSC route; or client useInterval with router.refresh()
Hardcoded single-line mock (LINE-01) → Server Component reading oee_snapshots for all active lines; render in responsive grid
Font sizes (96px OEE value) → Tailwind text-9xl; ensure ColorBrewer RdYlGn palette used for color-blind safety (BL-OEE-03)
No interactive controls (read-only kiosk) → no focusable elements; remove all Button/Link from TV route
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.tv.*') with minimal key set
known_bugs: BL-OEE-06: TV OS kiosk decision pending (P2 priority)

label: p2_placeholder_shell
translation_notes: Generic P2Placeholder component → shared <ComingSoonPage> primitive in /components/shared/coming-soon-page.tsx; accept title, description, featureFlag, alternativeLink props
window.alert cross-links → Next.js <Link> components; /reporting/rules-usage and /settings/feature-flags as actual routes
Data preview stub table with opacity:0.6 → render only when data prop provided; use same shadcn Table with skeleton rows
Feature flag prop → read from 02-SETTINGS feature_flags table server-side; display actual flag name and current value
Hardcoded emoji ⏳ → remove or use lucide-react Clock icon for consistency with design system
